meaning: 季节中期(指仲春,仲夏,仲秋,仲冬),旺季,忙季
examples: I put myself through my own midseason training camp.
The Mavericks have nothing to show for their active summer and blockbuster midseason trade.
Voiceover: the midseason finale left us with one of the biggest cliffhangers in TV history.
So, what if Alderson waves a midseason white flag and trades his valuable pieces?
It sort of feels like a mini season finale even though it's just a midseason finale.
